Package glide.api.models

  • Class Summary 
    Class Description
    BaseBatch<T extends BaseBatch<T>>
    Base class encompassing shared commands for both standalone and cluster server installations.
    Batch
    Batch implementation for standalone GlideClient.
    ClusterBatch
    Batch implementation for cluster GlideClusterClient.
    ClusterTransaction Deprecated.
    This class is deprecated and should no longer be used.
    ClusterValue<T>
    Represents a returned value object from a the server with cluster-mode enabled.
    GlideString
    Represents a Valkey string type.
    PubSubMessage
    PubSub message received by the client.
    Script
    A wrapper for a Script object for GenericBaseCommands#invokeScript(Script) As long as this object is not closed, the script's code is saved in memory, and can be resent to the server.
    Transaction Deprecated.
    This class is deprecated and should no longer be used.
